title: is max_bytes_in_distinct working correctly?
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Question
version 25.9.4.58
**is max_bytes_in_distinct working correctly?**
description of parameters
https://clickhouse.com/docs/operations/settings/settings#max_bytes_in_distinct
https://clickhouse.com/docs/operations/settings/settings#distinct_overflow_mode
**Example**
max_memory_usage = 12_000_000_000
**Creating a test table**
CREATE TABLE test_distinct_oom ( id UInt64, value String ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id;
**inserting the data**
INSERT INTO test_distinct_oom SELECT number, toString(number) FROM numbers(100000000);
**selecting the data**
SELECT DISTINCT value
FROM test_distinct_oom
SETTINGS max_bytes_in_distinct = 4_000_000_000, distinct_overflow_mode='break';
**execution result**
Showed 1000 out of 66616201 rows.
66616201 rows in set. Elapsed: 14.032 sec. Processed 66.92 million rows, 1.09 GB (4.77 million rows/s., 77.65 MB/s.)
Peak memory usage: 10.89 GiB.
Received exception from server (version 25.9.4):
Code: 241. DB::Exception: Received from localhost:9000. DB::Exception: Query memory limit exceeded: would use 11.64 GiB (attempt to allocate chunk of 770.43 MiB), maximum: 11.18 GiB.. (MEMORY_LIMIT_EXCEEDED)
**from the log file**
2025.10.29 14:50:11.655378 [ 47668 ] {d397c079-0208-4811-978f-c09268635134} <Error> executeQuery: Code: 241. DB::Exception: Query memory limit exceeded: would use 11.64 GiB (attempt to allocate chunk of 770.43 MiB), maximum: 11.18 GiB. (MEMORY_LIMIT_EXCEEDED) (version 25.9.4.58 (official build)) (from 127.0.0.1:57658) (query 1, line 1) (in query: SELECT DISTINCT value FROM test_distinct_oom1 SETTINGS max_bytes_in_distinct = 4_000_000_000, distinct_overflow_mode='break';)
It's not clear to me why the out-of-memory error occurs. If the parameter is set to 3 times less than the maximum memory...
Maybe you need to tweak something else?
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_distinct_oom_v2 ( id BIGINT, value VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ENGINE = OBTable;

INSERT INTO test_distinct_oom_v2 SELECT number, CASE WHEN number % 2 = 0 THEN CAST(number AS VARCHAR(255)) ELSE NULL END FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS number FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 100000000);
CREATE TABLE test_distinct_oom_v3 ( id INT, value FLOAT, category VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT 'unknown' ) ENGINE = OBTable;
INSERT INTO test_distinct_oom_v3 SELECT number, number / 3.14, CAST(number % 10 AS VARCHAR(255)) FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS number FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 1000000);
key_bug_features: max_bytes_in_distinct setting causing memory limit exceeded error
